SHADOWFALL-CAREFUL_PLANNING.title: Careful Planning
SHADOWFALL-CAREFUL_PLANNING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
When discarded, [gold]Enchant[/gold] all cards in hand that gain [gold]Block[/gold] with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple] [blue]{Nimble:diff()}[/blue].
SHADOWFALL-STRIKE_TRUE.title: Strike True
SHADOWFALL-STRIKE_TRUE.description:
Gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
When discarded, [gold]Enchant[/gold] all attacks in hand with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple] [blue]{Sharp:diff()}[/blue].
SHADOWFALL-SHARP_WIT.title: Sharp Wit
SHADOWFALL-SHARP_WIT.description:
Put {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Next turn, draw {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} cards.
SHADOWFALL-SHARP_WIT.selectionScreenProm: Choose cards to put on top of your Draw Pile.
SHADOWFALL-AMBUSH.title: Ambush
SHADOWFALL-AMBUSH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever an adjacent card is discarded, increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()}.
SHADOWFALL-STRIKE_SHADOW_SILENT.title: Strike
SHADOWFALL-DEFEND_SHADOW_SILENT.title: Defend
SHADOWFALL-BORROWED_NOTES.title: Borrowed Notes
SHADOWFALL-BORROWED_NOTES.description: Add a random {IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded |}Attack and Skill from a different class, and a [gold]Weight[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-WEIGHT_TRAINING.title: Weight Training
SHADOWFALL-WEIGHT_TRAINING.description: Whenever you discard a card, gain {WeightTrainingPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-SHARE_THE_LOAD.title: Share the Load
SHADOWFALL-SHARE_THE_LOAD.description: Whenever any player [gold]Exhausts[/gold] a card, all players gain {ShareTheLoadPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-VIPER_FORM.title: Viper Form
SHADOWFALL-VIPER_FORM.description: The first {ViperFormPower:diff()} times you play your rightmost card each turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and draw a card.
SHADOWFALL-TIP_THE_SCALES.title: Tip the Scales
SHADOWFALL-TIP_THE_SCALES.description:
[gold]Weights[/gold] are treated as having {TipTheScalesPower:diff()} more cost than they have.
Add a [gold]Weight[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-STALK_PREY.title: Stalk Prey
SHADOWFALL-SACRIFICE.title: Sacrifice
SHADOWFALL-THROWING_WEIGHT.title: Throwing Weight
SHADOWFALL-THROWING_WEIGHT.description: When you discard a [gold]Weight[/gold], deal {ThrowingWeightPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
SHADOWFALL-ATTACK_OF_OPPORTUNITY.title: Attack of Opportunity
SHADOWFALL-ATTACK_OF_OPPORTUNITY.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add {Wards:diff()} [gold]Wards[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-SEEK.title: Seek
SHADOWFALL-SEEK.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and add {Cards:plural:it|them} to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-SEEK.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to add to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-VULPINE_FORM.title: Vulpine Form
SHADOWFALL-BLADE_WARD.title: Blade Ward
SHADOWFALL-BLADE_WARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
When discarded, add a [gold]Ward[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-HUNT_FOR_COVER.title: Hunt for Cover
SHADOWFALL-HUNT_FOR_COVER.description:
Discard {Discard:diff()} cards.
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Wards+|Wards}[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-WARD.title: Ward
SHADOWFALL-MASTERMIND.title: Mastermind
SHADOWFALL-MASTERMIND.description: [gold]Devious[/gold]. Choose a card in your [gold]Draw[/gold] or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-QUICK_ESCAPE.title: Quick Escape
SHADOWFALL-QUICK_ESCAPE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have discarded a card this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SHADOWFALL-CALIBRATED_RESPONSE.title: Calibrated Response
SHADOWFALL-CALIBRATED_RESPONSE.descripti:
[gold]Devious[/gold]. Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Block is not removed at the start of your next turn.
SHADOWFALL-NEUTRALIZE.title: Neutralize
SHADOWFALL-CHOKING_HAZARD.title: Choking Hazard
SHADOWFALL-CHOKING_HAZARD.description:
Enemy loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
Add a [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your draw pile.
SHADOWFALL-VIPERS_KISS.title: Viper's Kiss
SHADOWFALL-CAROM.title: Carom
SHADOWFALL-CAROM.description: [gold]Devious[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
SHADOWFALL-NIMBLENESS.title: Nimbleness
SHADOWFALL-NIMBLENESS.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Add a [gold]Weight[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-WEIGHTED_STRIKE.title: Weighted Strike
SHADOWFALL-WEIGHTED_STRIKE.description:
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each other card in your hand, plus {CalculationBase:diff()}.
(Deal {CalculatedDamage} damage total.)
SHADOWFALL-DEEP_CUT.title: Deep Cut
SHADOWFALL-HEAVY_HANDED.title: Heavy Handed
SHADOWFALL-HEAVY_HANDED.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less for each Status in your hand.
SHADOWFALL-FLAY.title: Flay
SHADOWFALL-FLAY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy has:
[gold]Weak[/gold] - Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]Bleed[/gold] - Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Both - [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-BLOOD_CATALYST.title: Blood Catalyst
SHADOWFALL-BLOODTAP.title: Bloodtap
SHADOWFALL-BLOODTAP.description:
Gain {InstinctPower:diff()} [gold]Instinct[/gold].
At the start of your turn, apply {BloodtapPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SHADOWFALL-VAMPIRE.title: Vampire
SHADOWFALL-VAMPIRE.description: [gold]Devious[/gold]. Remove a [gold]Bleed[/gold] from the target to heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
SHADOWFALL-VANTOMANCY.title: Vantomancy
SHADOWFALL-SNAP_STRIKE.title: Snap Strike
SHADOWFALL-SNAP_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add 2 [gold]Shivs[/gold] and a [gold]Weight[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-SURPRISE_SHIVS.title: Surprise Shivs
SHADOWFALL-SURPRISE_SHIVS.description:
[gold]Devious[/gold]. Add {Shivs:diff()} [gold]Shivs[/gold] to your hand.
Your [gold]Shivs[/gold] deal {AccuracyPower:diff()} more damage this combat.
SHADOWFALL-PLUME.title: Plume
SHADOWFALL-NEGOTIATE.title: Negotiate
SHADOWFALL-ENCORE.title: Encore
SHADOWFALL-ENCORE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When discarded, reduce its cost by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for the combat.
SHADOWFALL-SNEAKY_STRIKE.title: Sneaky Strike
SHADOWFALL-SNEAKY_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have discarded a card this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SHADOWFALL-LITTLE_ARROWS.title: Little Arrows
SHADOWFALL-LITTLE_ARROWS.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each Status in your hand.
SHADOWFALL-SANGUINE_SCRYING.title: Sanguine Scrying
SHADOWFALL-SANGUINE_SCRYING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the target is [gold]Weak[/gold], gain {InstinctPower:diff()} [gold]Instinct[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-PREPARE.title: Prepare
SHADOWFALL-SHANK_AND_FLANK.title: Shank and Flank
SHADOWFALL-SHANK_AND_FLANK.description: At the start of each turn, add a [gold]Shiv[/gold] and a [gold]Ward[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-SHOW_OFF.title: Show Off
SHADOWFALL-SHOW_OFF.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
}After you play your first Attack each turn, draw a card
SHADOWFALL-BLADE_OF_IRE.title: Blade of Ire
SHADOWFALL-BLADE_OF_IRE.description:
Whenever you play an Attack, gain {BladeOfIrePower:diff()} [gold]Temporary Strength[/gold].
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].|}
SHADOWFALL-BELLOWTRAUMA.title: Bellowtrauma
SHADOWFALL-BELLOWTRAUMA.description:
Apply {BleedPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold] to ALL enemies.
If already [gold]Bleeding[/gold], also apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-FAREWELL.title: Farewell
SHADOWFALL-FAREWELL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have discarded a card this turn, deal {Damage:diff()} damage again.
SHADOWFALL-SUBTERFUGE.title: Subterfuge
SHADOWFALL-SUBTERFUGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Add a [gold]Weight[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-SUBTERFUGE.selectionScreenPro: Choose cards to return to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-HEAVY_SHIELD.title: Heavy Shield
SHADOWFALL-HEAVY_SHIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Weight[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-BLADE_CYCLONE.title: Blade Cyclone
SHADOWFALL-BLADE_CYCLONE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice.
Add a [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your draw pile.
SHADOWFALL-BLOODWAVE.title: Bloodwave
SHADOWFALL-BLOODWAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.{Repeat:cond:>0?
Repeat {Repeat:diff()} times|}.
Repeat this an additional time whenever you apply [gold]Bleed[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-ALCHEMICAL_GAMBLE.title: Alchemical Gamble
SHADOWFALL-MAKING_CHANGE.title: Making Change
SHADOWFALL-ADVANTAGE.title: Advantage
SHADOWFALL-ADVANTAGE.description:
Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a Status this turn, gain {AdvantageBlockPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Slimed[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-FLUBBER_FLING.title: Flubber Fling
SHADOWFALL-FLUBBER_FLING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
Add a [gold]Slimed[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-PLUNDER.title: Plunder
SHADOWFALL-PLUNDER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw cards until you draw a non-[gold]Skill[/gold] card.
SHADOWFALL-UNLOAD.title: Unload
SHADOWFALL-UNLOAD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Discard all non-Attack cards.
SHADOWFALL-CHEAP_SHOT.title: Cheap Shot
SHADOWFALL-CHEAP_SHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Add a [gold]Weight[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-MEASURED_DEFENSE.title: Measured Defense
SHADOWFALL-LACERATE.title: Lacerate
SHADOWFALL-HUNTERS_PROWESS.title: Hunter's Prowess
SHADOWFALL-CALM_NERVES.title: Calm Nerves
SHADOWFALL-CALM_NERVES.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
When discarded, increase these values by 1 and return this to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-MASS_APPEAL.title: Mass Appeal
SHADOWFALL-MASS_APPEAL.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SHADOWFALL-WEIGHT.title: Weight
SHADOWFALL-WEIGHT.description: At the end of your turn, increase this card's cost by 1 (up to 3).
SHADOWFALL-DECAY.title: Decay
SHADOWFALL-INVOKE.title: Invoke
SHADOWFALL-INVOKE.description: Trigger the passive effects of your Orbs.
SHADOWFALL-POKE.title: Poke
SHADOWFALL-COSMIC_WAVE.title: Cosmic Wave
SHADOWFALL-LANCING_BOLT.title: Lancing Bolt
SHADOWFALL-BRAINSHOCK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Void[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-BRAINSHOCK.title: Brainshock
SHADOWFALL-RIP_AND_TEAR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy 3 times.
Discard a card.
SHADOWFALL-RIP_AND_TEAR.title: Rip and Tear
SHADOWFALL-DARK_BOOST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a [gold]Void[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-DARK_BOOST.title: Dark Boost
SHADOWFALL-FORGE.title: Forge
SHADOWFALL-PHASIC_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Trigger the passive ability of your rightmost Orb {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times}.
SHADOWFALL-PHASIC_STRIKE.title: Phasic Strike
SHADOWFALL-END_OF_CREATION.title: End of Creation
SHADOWFALL-EVENTIDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times}.
Put a [gold]Void[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-EVENTIDE.title: Eventide
SHADOWFALL-INFECTED_SHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next time you Exhaust a Void, the target loses {PowerAmount:diff()} HP.
SHADOWFALL-INFECTED_SHOT.title: Infected Shot
SHADOWFALL-CLARION_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next time you draw a Void, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SHADOWFALL-CLARION_STRIKE.title: ClarionStrike
SHADOWFALL-ROD_OF_RUIN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
At the start of your next 2 turns, [gold]channel[/gold] a [gold]Dark[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-ROD_OF_RUIN.title: RodOfRuin
SHADOWFALL-GAZE.title: Gaze
SHADOWFALL-WRECK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for each Orb you have.
SHADOWFALL-WRECK.title: Wreck
SHADOWFALL-UNHOLY_STRENGTH.title: UnholyStrength
SHADOWFALL-KNIFES_EDGE.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} Strength.
Add 2 [gold]Voids[/gold] to your discard pile.
SHADOWFALL-KNIFES_EDGE.title: Knife's Edge
SHADOWFALL-PEER.title: Peer
SHADOWFALL-WHITE_HOLE.description:
[gold]Channel[/gold] a [gold]Plasma[/gold].
Add a [gold]Void[/gold] to the top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-WHITE_HOLE.title: White Hole
SHADOWFALL-GIGABEAM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Put a [gold]Void[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-GIGABEAM.title: Gigabeam
SHADOWFALL-MULTI_CALL.description: Trigger the passive abilities of your Orbs {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} {IfUpgraded:show:times|time}.
SHADOWFALL-MULTI_CALL.title: Multi-call
SHADOWFALL-CRITICAL_MASS.description: If you have no [gold]Energy[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SHADOWFALL-CRITICAL_MASS.title: Critical Mass
SHADOWFALL-PAINBOW.title: Painbow
SHADOWFALL-COLLAPSE.title: Collapse
SHADOWFALL-COLD_FRONT.title: Cold Front
SHADOWFALL-COLD_FRONT.description:
Discard up to {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Frost[/gold] for each discarded.
SHADOWFALL-ONYX_DRILL.title: Onyx Drill
SHADOWFALL-ONYX_DRILL.description:
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Void[/gold] you have.
(Deal {CalculatedDamage} damage total.)
SHADOWFALL-SHADOW_STRIKE.title: Shadow Strike
SHADOWFALL-SHADOW_STRIKE.description:
Discard any number of cards.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy for each.
SHADOWFALL-BLIGHTSTORM.title: Blightstorm
SHADOWFALL-BLIGHTSTORM.description: Trigger the [gold]Evoke[/gold] effects of your Orbs without losing them.
SHADOWFALL-THE_LAW.title: The Law
SHADOWFALL-THE_LAW.description:
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Claw+|Claw}[/gold] to your hand.
Increase this number by 1 permanently.
SHADOWFALL-SLUDGE_BOMB.title: Sludge Bomb
SHADOWFALL-SLUDGE_BOMB.description: If you have a [gold]Void[/gold] in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], spend it and deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
SHADOWFALL-ALTAR.title: Altar
SHADOWFALL-ALTAR.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card. If it was a [gold]Void[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SHADOWFALL-GLOOMGUARD.title: Gloomguard
SHADOWFALL-GLOOMGUARD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Costs 0 if a [gold]Void[/gold] is in hand.
SHADOWFALL-COLD_WINDS.title: Cold Winds
SHADOWFALL-COLD_WINDS.description:
[gold]Evoke[/gold] all non-[gold]Frost[/gold] Orbs.
[gold]Channel[/gold] that many [gold]Frost[/gold] plus 1.
SHADOWFALL-BATTERY_BACKUP.title: Battery Backup
SHADOWFALL-BATTERY_BACKUP.description: Reset your Energy to its max value{IfUpgraded:show: + {Energy:diff()}|}.
SHADOWFALL-FISSION.title: Fission
SHADOWFALL-FISSION.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Evoke|Remove} all your Orbs.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons(1)} and draw 1 card for each Orb {IfUpgraded:show:Evoked|Removed}.
SHADOWFALL-COSMIC_FORM.title: Cosmic Form
SHADOWFALL-COSMIC_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons(1)}, draw a card, then discard 1.
SHADOWFALL-CMBR.title: CMBR
SHADOWFALL-CMBR.description: At the start of each turn, add an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] [gold]White Noise[/gold] to your hand.
SHADOWFALL-ECLIPSE_EMBRACE.title: Eclipse Embrace
SHADOWFALL-ECLIPSE_EMBRACE.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [gold]Void[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons(1)} and draw a card next turn.
SHADOWFALL-POWERCYCLE.title: Power Cycle
SHADOWFALL-SINGLE_MIND.description: If all your Orbs are the same type, gain 1 [gold]Focus[/gold]
SHADOWFALL-SINGLE_MIND.title: Single Mind
SHADOWFALL-BLACK_ICE.description:
Channel 1 [gold]Dark[/gold].
 Your [gold]Dark[/gold] orbs grants {IfUpgraded:2|3} [gold]Block[/gold] at the end of your turn.
SHADOWFALL-BLACK_ICE.title: Black Ice
SHADOWFALL-TRINVOKE.description: Trigger the passive effects of your Orbs 3 times.
SHADOWFALL-TRINVOKE.title: Trinvoke
SHADOWFALL-PROCESS.title: Process
SHADOWFALL-PROCESS.description: Play a card in your draw pile. Shuffle in [gold]Voids[/gold] equal to its cost.
SHADOWFALL-SONG_OF_SORROW.title: Song of Sorrow
SHADOWFALL-SONG_OF_SORROW.description: Whenever you create a [gold]Void[/gold], all enemies lose {Damage:diff()} HP.
SHADOWFALL-EXPANSION.title: Expansion
SHADOWFALL-INVITATION.title: Invitation
SHADOWFALL-INVITATION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:Status or Curse card|Status or Curse cards} from your [gold]Draw[/gold] or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-INVITATION.selectionScreenPro: Choose a card to take into your hand.
SHADOWFALL-STARBURST.title: Starburst
SHADOWFALL-ABRA_CADAVER.title: Abra Cadaver
SHADOWFALL-ABRA_CADAVER.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn for ALL your [purple]Curse[/purple] cards +2.{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedStr} [gold]Strength[/gold])|}
SHADOWFALL-AVARICE.title: Avarice
SHADOWFALL-AWAY_WITH_YOU.title: Away With You!
SHADOWFALL-AWAY_WITH_YOU.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card.
If you can, remove it from your [gold]Deck[/gold] and lose 5 Max HP.
SHADOWFALL-BACKHAND.title: Backhand
SHADOWFALL-BACKHAND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you draw, create, or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [purple]Curse[/purple], put this into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-BLAST_FROM_THE_PAST.title: Blast from the Past
SHADOWFALL-BLAST_FROM_THE_PAST.descripti: Choose {Cards:diff()} of 5 random cards from your last winning run to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-BLAST_FROM_THE_PAST.selection: Choose {Cards} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your last winning run.
SHADOWFALL-BONECAGE.title: Bonecage
SHADOWFALL-BONECAGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Linger[/gold] - Gain {LingerBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold], then decrease this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by 1 this combat.
SHADOWFALL-BONE_STORM.title: Bone Storm
SHADOWFALL-BONE_STORM.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-BONE_VOYAGE.title: Bone Voyage
SHADOWFALL-BONE_VOYAGE.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Add {Cards} [gold]Soul Strikes[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
[gold]Linger[/gold] - Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SHADOWFALL-BOO_BUDDIES.title: Boo Buddies
SHADOWFALL-BOO_BUDDIES.description: The first time you play a [gold]Soul Strike[/gold] each turn, play an additional copy of it.
SHADOWFALL-BRAINPHAGE.title: Brainphage
SHADOWFALL-CLANG.title: Clang
SHADOWFALL-CLANG.description:
Can only be played if you have a [purple]Curse[/purple] in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
SHADOWFALL-CLENCH_FIST.title: Clench Fist
SHADOWFALL-CLENCH_FIST.description:
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
[gold]Linger[/gold] - Draw a card next turn
SHADOWFALL-CONVOKE.title: Convoke
SHADOWFALL-DARKBLADES.title: Darkblades
SHADOWFALL-DARKBLADES.description: ALL players add {Cards:diff()} [gold]{Cards:plural:Soul Strike|Soul Strikes}[/gold] into their [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-DEAD_END.title: Dead End
SHADOWFALL-DISSOCIATE.title: Dissociate
SHADOWFALL-DOPPELGANGER.title: Doppelganger
SHADOWFALL-DOPPELGANGER.description: Next turn, draw {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} cards and gain {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SHADOWFALL-FINAL_FORM.title: Final Form
SHADOWFALL-FINAL_FORM.description:
Exhaust 1 card{IfUpgraded:show:| at random}.
At the start of your next 5 turns, play a copy of it.
SHADOWFALL-FLICKER_JAB.title: Flicker Jab
SHADOWFALL-GRAVE_GUARD.title: Grave Guard
SHADOWFALL-GRAVE_GUARD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Soul Strike[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-GRAVEYARD_SMASH.title: Graveyard Smash
SHADOWFALL-GRAVEYARD_SMASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards} cards.
Whenever this returns from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold], reduce this card's cost by 1 this combat.
SHADOWFALL-GRIMOIRE_OF_SOULS.title: Grimoire of Souls
SHADOWFALL-GRIMOIRE_OF_SOULS.description:
Add {Cards:diff()} [purple]Clumsy[/purple] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Whenever you play a [gold]Soul Strike[/gold], draw 1 card.
SHADOWFALL-GRUDGE.title: Grudge
SHADOWFALL-GRUDGE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for ALL your [purple]Curse[/purple] cards.
SHADOWFALL-HANDCLAP.title: Handclap
SHADOWFALL-HANDCLAP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Hits ALL enemies if you have at least {CurseThreshold} [purple]Curses[/purple].
SHADOWFALL-HARVEST.title: Harvest
SHADOWFALL-HARVEST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Linger[/gold] - This gains {Increase:diff()} damage, then shuffles into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-HAUNTED_HAND.title: Haunted Hand
SHADOWFALL-HUBRIS.title: Hubris
SHADOWFALL-LAMENT.title: Lament
SHADOWFALL-LAMENT.description:
Strike cards deal {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} more damage this combat.
Add {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} [gold]Soul Strikes[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-LAST_RITES.title: Last Rites
SHADOWFALL-LAST_RITES.description:
Deal {Damage} damage.
Costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less for ALL of your [purple]Curses[/purple].
SHADOWFALL-LOSE_CONTROL.title: Lose Control
SHADOWFALL-MANIFEST.title: Manifest
SHADOWFALL-MORE_MORE.title: More, MORE!
SHADOWFALL-MORE_MORE.description:
After combat, gain an additional card reward.
[gold]Pickup[/gold] - Obtain [purple]Regret[/purple].
SHADOWFALL-NECROMANCY.title: Necromancy
SHADOWFALL-NECROMANCY.description: Put ALL [gold]Soul Strikes[/gold] from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Draw Pile|Discard Pile}[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-OBLATION.title: Oblation
SHADOWFALL-OBLATION.description: Transform a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Soul Strike+|Soul Strike}[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-OVERTAKE.title: Overtake
SHADOWFALL-OVERTAKE.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
[gold]Linger[/gold] - Next turn, draw {Cards} cards and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SHADOWFALL-PATIENCE.title: Patience
SHADOWFALL-PENANCE.title: Penance
SHADOWFALL-PRIDE.title: Pride
SHADOWFALL-PURE_AURA.title: Pure Aura
SHADOWFALL-ZOMBIFICATION.title: Zombification
SHADOWFALL-ZOMBIFICATION.description: At the start of your turn, put a random playable card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-RELIQUARY_REAVER.title: Reliquary Reaver
SHADOWFALL-RELIQUARY_REAVER.description:
Deal {Damage} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], obtain a random {IfUpgraded:show:rare|uncommon} [gold]Relic[/gold] and remove this card from your [gold]Deck[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-REND_SPIRIT.title: Rend Spirit
SHADOWFALL-REND_SPIRIT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Soul Strike[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Hand[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-RESURRECTION.title: Resurrection
SHADOWFALL-RESURRECTION.description: ALL players add 1 [gold]Graveblast[/gold] into their [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
SHADOWFALL-REST_IN_PIECES.title: Rest in Pieces
SHADOWFALL-REST_IN_PIECES.description:
Deal {Damage} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
[gold]Linger[/gold] - This hits 2 additional times this combat.
SHADOWFALL-RIGHT_CROSS.title: Right Cross
SHADOWFALL-RIGHT_CROSS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you play a card that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more, return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold] from the [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-RIGOR_MORFIST.title: Rigor Morfist
SHADOWFALL-RIGOR_MORFIST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Soul Strike[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-SAVED_BY_THE_BELL.title: Saved by the Bell
SHADOWFALL-SERVITUDE.title: Servitude
SHADOWFALL-SINFUL_STRIKE.title: Sinful Strike
SHADOWFALL-SMUSH.title: Smush
SHADOWFALL-SMUSH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This card costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} if you have played a card that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more this turn.
SHADOWFALL-SPITE.title: Spite
SHADOWFALL-SPITE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and draw {Cards} card for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-SPRAY_N_PRAY.title: Spray n' Pray
SHADOWFALL-SPRAY_N_PRAY.description:
Deal {Damage} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
Add a [purple]Doubt[/purple] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-TASTY_MORSELS.title: Tasty Morsels
SHADOWFALL-TASTY_MORSELS.description:
Gain {PlatingPower:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
Whenever an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Plating[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-THE_END_IS_COMING.title: The End is Coming
SHADOWFALL-THE_END_IS_COMING.description:
The third time this is played, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] this.{InCombat:
{PlayCount:choose(3):|(Played {PlayCount}/3 times)}|}
SHADOWFALL-TIME_OUT.title: Time Out
SHADOWFALL-TIME_OUT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
If you drew a [purple]Curse[/purple], ALL enemies lose {StrengthLoss} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SHADOWFALL-VIOLET_VEIL.title: Violet Veil
SHADOWFALL-VIOLET_VEIL.description:
At the end of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
If it's a [purple]Curse[/purple], gain {VioletVeilPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-VOODOO.title: Voodoo
SHADOWFALL-VOODOO.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
Enemy loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Pickup[/gold] - Obtain [purple]Normality[/purple].
SHADOWFALL-WORK_OUT.title: Work Out
SHADOWFALL-WRATH.title: Wrath
SHADOWFALL-YOUR_DOOM_IS_NIGH.title: Your Doom is Nigh
SHADOWFALL-YOUR_DOOM_IS_NIGH.description: Whenever you draw a [purple]Curse[/purple], a random enemy loses {Damage:diff()} HP.
SHADOWFALL-ANCESTRAL_ECHO.title: Ancestral Echo
SHADOWFALL-ANCESTRAL_ECHO.description: Add [gold]Replay[/gold] {Replay:diff()} to the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-ANCIENT_THRALL.title: Ancient Thrall
SHADOWFALL-ANCIENT_THRALL.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
If this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], it must be played before other cards.
SHADOWFALL-ARMOR_OF_GNEISS.title: Armor of Gneiss
SHADOWFALL-ASSAULT.title: Assault
SHADOWFALL-ASSAULT.description: Play any Attacks in the top {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and discard the rest.
SHADOWFALL-AVALANCHE.title: Avalanche
SHADOWFALL-AVALANCHE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Transform[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into random [gold]Rocks[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-AVALANCHE.selectionScreenProm: Choose any number of cards to [gold]Transform[/gold] into random [gold]Rocks[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-BATTLE_SHOUT.title: Battle Shout
SHADOWFALL-BATTLE_SHOUT.description: Increase the damage of ALL Attacks in your [gold]Hand[/gold] by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
SHADOWFALL-BEDROCK.title: Bedrock
SHADOWFALL-BEDROCK.description: At the start of each turn, ALL players gain {BedrockPower:diff()} [gold]Slate[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-BERSERKING.title: Berserking
SHADOWFALL-BERSERKING.description: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SHADOWFALL-BLITZ.title: Blitz
SHADOWFALL-BLOODRAIN.title: Bloodrain
SHADOWFALL-BLOODRAIN.description: Apply {BloodbondPower:diff()} [gold]Bloodbond[/gold] to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
SHADOWFALL-BORE.title: Bore
SHADOWFALL-BORE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Small Rock[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-BLIND_FURY.title: Blind Fury
SHADOWFALL-BLIND_FURY.description:
End your turn.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, and your turn is played by [red]Vakuu[/red].
SHADOWFALL-BLOOD_LASH.title: Blood Lash
SHADOWFALL-BLOOD_LASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Bloodbond[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
SHADOWFALL-BUM_RUSH.title: Bum Rush
SHADOWFALL-BUM_RUSH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-BUM_RUSH.selectionScreenPromp: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
SHADOWFALL-CALDERA.title: Caldera
SHADOWFALL-CALDERA.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Bomb Rock[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-CALDERA.description: [gold]Transform[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]Bomb Rock[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-CARBON_COATING.title: Carbon Coating
SHADOWFALL-CARBON_COATING.description:
Gain [gold]Slate[/gold] equal to the number of Attacks played this turn.{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedSlate:diff()} [gold]Slate[/gold])|}
SHADOWFALL-CLAYMAKER.title: Claymaker
SHADOWFALL-CLAYMAKER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
If this is played from outside of your [gold]Hand[/gold], add a 0-cost [gold]Shockwave[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-DEADLANDS_HEX.title: Deadlands Hex
SHADOWFALL-DEADLANDS_HEX.description:
Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Transform[/gold] ALL copies of it into [gold]Ghost Rock[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-DEFEND_SHADOW_IRONCLAD.title: Defend
SHADOWFALL-DEPOSIT.title: Deposit
SHADOWFALL-DIG_DEEP.title: Dig Deep
SHADOWFALL-DIG_DEEP.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
This card cannot be played again this turn.
SHADOWFALL-DISMEMBER.title: Dismember
SHADOWFALL-DISMEMBER.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-EARTHBEND.title: Earthbend
SHADOWFALL-EARTHBEND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put a random [gold]Rock[/gold] from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-FELDSPAR.title: Feldspar
SHADOWFALL-FLAMEFIST.title: Flamefist
SHADOWFALL-FLAME_BARRIER_SHADOW.title: Flame Barrier
SHADOWFALL-GABBRO.title: Gabbro
SHADOWFALL-GALACTIC_STRIKE.title: Galactic Strike
SHADOWFALL-GALACTIC_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Transform[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into a [gold]Deep Rock[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-GRAPPLE.title: Grapple
SHADOWFALL-GRAPPLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, deal {GrappleDamage:diff()} damage to the enemy.
SHADOWFALL-GRAVELLIZE.title: Gravellize
SHADOWFALL-GRAVELLIZE.description:
[gold]Transform[/gold] a card into [gold]Spiked Rock[/gold].
If it was a [gold]Unplayable[/gold], add a [gold]Spiked Rock[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-IMMOLATE.title: Immolate
SHADOWFALL-IMMOLATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add a [gold]Burn[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-INCITE_VIOLENCE.title: Incite Violence
SHADOWFALL-INCITE_VIOLENCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat} times.
The enemy attacks you for {Recoil} damage.
SHADOWFALL-JAB.title: Jab
SHADOWFALL-JAB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you play a [gold]Rock[/gold], return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold] from the [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-LET_LOOSE.title: Let Loose
SHADOWFALL-LET_LOOSE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Put 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-LET_LOOSE.selectionScreenProm: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
SHADOWFALL-MEGALITH.title: Megalith
SHADOWFALL-OBSIDIAN.title: Obsidian
SHADOWFALL-OBSIDIAN.description:
Your [gold]Slate[/gold] cannot be lowered this turn.{IfUpgraded:show:
Gain {SlatePower} [gold]Slate[/gold].|}
SHADOWFALL-PAINTED_PETRA.title: Painted Petra
SHADOWFALL-PAINTED_PETRA.description:
Gain {SlatePower:diff()} [gold]Slate[/gold].
Choose 1 card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Tinted Rock[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-PEAK_PERFORMANCE.title: Peak Performance
SHADOWFALL-PEAK_PERFORMANCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
If this was played from outside of your [gold]Hand[/gold], repeat the effects above {Repeat:diff()} times.
SHADOWFALL-PEBBLEFLINGER.title: Pebbleflinger
SHADOWFALL-PEBBLEFLINGER.description: Every 3rd Skill you play, add a [gold]Small Rock[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-POWER_THROUGH.title: Power Through
SHADOWFALL-PYROCLAST.title: Pyroclast
SHADOWFALL-PYROCLAST.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and lose HP equal to your [gold]Slate[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-LANDSLIDE.title: Landslide
SHADOWFALL-LANDSLIDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Enemy loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SHADOWFALL-QUAKE.title: Quake
SHADOWFALL-QUAKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Transform[/gold] a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into [gold]Rolling Rock[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-QUARRY.title: Quarry
SHADOWFALL-QUARRY.description: Add X+1 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Small Rocks+[/gold]|[gold]Small Rocks[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-PILLAR_OF_MUTATION.title: Pillar of Mutation
SHADOWFALL-PILLAR_OF_MUTATION.descriptio: When you create a card, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-REAPER.title: Reaper
SHADOWFALL-REAPER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Heal HP equal to unblocked damage dealt.
SHADOWFALL-REVENGE.title: Revenge
SHADOWFALL-REVENGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Your [gold]Retaliation[/gold] will not be removed at the start of your next turn.
SHADOWFALL-RIEBECKITE.title: Riebeckite
SHADOWFALL-RUBBLEROUSER.title: Rubblerouser
SHADOWFALL-RUBBLEROUSER.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for ALL of your Rock cards.
SHADOWFALL-CHISEL.title: Chisel
SHADOWFALL-SILTSONG.title: Siltsong
SHADOWFALL-SONIC_BOOM.title: Sonic Boom
SHADOWFALL-SONIC_BOOM.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SHADOWFALL-STRIKE_SHADOW_IRONCLAD.title: Strike
SHADOWFALL-CLAY_SOLDIER.title: Clay Soldier
SHADOWFALL-CLAY_SOLDIER.description: The first time you lose HP each turn, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} temporary [gold]Strength[/gold] and {SlatePower:diff()} [gold]Slate[/gold] at the start of your next turn.
SHADOWFALL-TECTONIC_SHIFT.title: Tectonic Shift
SHADOWFALL-TECTONIC_SHIFT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Transform[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Small Rock+|Small Rock}[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-TEMPER.title: Temper
SHADOWFALL-TEMPER.description: Whenever you play a Skill, gain {RetaliationAmount:diff()} [gold]Retaliation[/gold] this turn.
SHADOWFALL-TERRA_FIRMA.title: Terra Firma
SHADOWFALL-TITANIC.title: Titanic
SHADOWFALL-VAMPIRIC_STRIKE.title: Vampiric Strike
SHADOWFALL-VAMPIRIC_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
If your HP is at or below 50%, heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
SHADOWFALL-VITAL_SURGE.title: Vital Surge
SHADOWFALL-UNHOLY_PACT.title: Unholy Pact
SHADOWFALL-UNRELENTING_FORM.title: Unrelenting Form
SHADOWFALL-UNRELENTING_FORM.description: The first time each turn you have no cards in [gold]Hand[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
SHADOWFALL-VAKUUS_MANTLE.title: Vakuu's Mantle
SHADOWFALL-VAKUUS_MANTLE.description: At the start of your turn, add a {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Don The Mantle+[/gold]|[gold]Don The Mantle[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-VOLCANIC_STRIKE.title: Volcanic Strike
SHADOWFALL-VOLCANIC_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Transform[/gold] a card in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into [gold]Molten Rock[/gold], then put it on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-VOLCANIC_STRIKE.selectionScre: Choose a card to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Molten Rock[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-WARCRAFT.title: Warcraft
SHADOWFALL-WARCRAFT.description: If you end a turn with at least 15 [gold]Block[/gold], play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-JOLT.title: Jolt
SHADOWFALL-JOLT.description: The first time you lose HP each turn, draw {JoltPower:diff()} {JoltPower:plural:card|cards}.
SHADOWFALL-WE_ARE_LEGION.title: We Are Legion
SHADOWFALL-WE_ARE_LEGION.description:
Choose an Attack card.
Transform ALL non-Attack cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into copies of it.
SHADOWFALL-WILD_STRIKE.title: Wild Strike
SHADOWFALL-WILD_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Wound[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-WOMBO_COMBO.title: Wombo Combo
SHADOWFALL-WOMBO_COMBO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Play a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-BOMB_ROCK.title: Bomb Rock
SHADOWFALL-BOMB_ROCK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Linger[/gold] - Reduce this card's cost by 1.
SHADOWFALL-DEATHGLARE.title: Deathglare
SHADOWFALL-DEATHGLARE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Linger[/gold] - Add a copy of this card into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-DEEP_ROCK.title: Deep Rock
SHADOWFALL-DEEP_ROCK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
SHADOWFALL-DON_THE_MANTLE.title: Don The Mantle
SHADOWFALL-GHOST_ROCK.title: Ghost Rock
SHADOWFALL-MADNESS.title: Madness
SHADOWFALL-MADNESS.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
A random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this combat.
SHADOWFALL-MOLTEN_ROCK.title: Molten Rock
SHADOWFALL-MOLTEN_ROCK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Increase the damage of ALL your Rock cards by {GabbroPower:diff()} this combat.
SHADOWFALL-PALE_GAZE.title: Pale Gaze
SHADOWFALL-ROLLING_ROCK.title: Rolling Rock
SHADOWFALL-ROLLING_ROCK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
SHADOWFALL-SMALL_ROCK.title: Small Rock
SHADOWFALL-SPIKED_ROCK.title: Spiked Rock
SHADOWFALL-SOUL_STRIKE.title: Soul Strike
SHADOWFALL-TINTED_ROCK.title: Tinted Rock
SHADOWFALL-LOAD.title: Load
SHADOWFALL-STAR_CHARTS.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your hand into your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-STAR_CHARTS.title: Star Charts
SHADOWFALL-FUTURE_PROOFING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card in your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-FUTURE_PROOFING.title: Future Proofing
SHADOWFALL-CHARTER.title: Charter
SHADOWFALL-CRESCENT_SPEAR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add an [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Ultimate Strike+|Ultimate Strike}[/gold] to your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-CRESCENT_SPEAR.title: Crescent Spear
SHADOWFALL-ICE_BEAM.title: Ice Beam
SHADOWFALL-GUIDING_SHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When you draw this, apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to a random enemy.
SHADOWFALL-GUIDING_SHOT.title: Guiding Shot
SHADOWFALL-STOW_AWAY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Put a card from your hand into your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-STOW_AWAY.title: Stow Away
SHADOWFALL-SOLAR_STRIKE.title: Solar Strike
SHADOWFALL-POWERED_BEAM.description: When you draw this, Load {LoadAmmo:diff()} [gold]Ammo[/gold] and gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-POWERED_BEAM.title: Powered Beam
SHADOWFALL-BENEATH_ME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times}.
Increase this card's hits by 1 this combat.
SHADOWFALL-BENEATH_ME.title: Beneath Me
SHADOWFALL-ROYAL_CLOAK.description: At the end of your turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card in your hand.
SHADOWFALL-ROYAL_CLOAK.title: Royal Cloak
SHADOWFALL-PLOT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-PLOT.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to move to your Cargo.
SHADOWFALL-PLOT.title: Plot
SHADOWFALL-FIRE_AWAY.description:
Load {LoadAmmo:diff()} [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Your next [gold]Shot[/gold] fired this turn deals {FirepowerPower:diff()} more damage.
SHADOWFALL-FIRE_AWAY.title: Fire Away
SHADOWFALL-RELOAD.description:
Load {LoadAmmo:diff()} [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Load another for each attack played this turn.
SHADOWFALL-RELOAD.title: Reload
SHADOWFALL-SMUGGLERS_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put the next card you play this turn into your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-SMUGGLERS_STRIKE.title: Smuggler's Strike
SHADOWFALL-JETTISON.description:
Put any number of cards from your hand into your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each.
SHADOWFALL-JETTISON.title: Jettison
SHADOWFALL-KNOWLEDGE_BLAST.title: Knowledge Blast
SHADOWFALL-ILLICIT_MUNITIONS.description:
Put a [gold]Volley[/gold] and [gold]Salvo[/gold] into your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
Give them [gold]Retain[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-ILLICIT_MUNITIONS.title: Illicit Munitions
SHADOWFALL-SHADOW_CRYSTAL.title: Shadow Crystal
SHADOWFALL-ENERGIZE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Costs 0 if an X cost card was played this turn.
SHADOWFALL-ENERGIZE.title: Energize
SHADOWFALL-STRONGARM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
SHADOWFALL-STRONGARM.title: Strongarm
SHADOWFALL-FILL_THE_TANK.title: Fill the Tank
SHADOWFALL-FIRST_OFFICER.description: Give another player {IfUpgraded:show:an upgraded |}[gold]Coordinate[/gold], [gold]Believe in You[/gold], or [gold]Lift[/gold] at random.
SHADOWFALL-FIRST_OFFICER.title: First Officer
SHADOWFALL-REINFORCED_BODY.title: Reinforced Body
SHADOWFALL-GATHER_LIGHT.title: Gather Light
SHADOWFALL-GLOW.description:
Gain {ShardPower:diff()} [gold]Shard[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
Next turn, draw {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} card.
SHADOWFALL-GLOW.title: Glow
SHADOWFALL-HIDDEN_CACHE.title: Hidden Cache
SHADOWFALL-BANANA.description:
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
Add a [gold]Trip[/gold] to your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-BANANA.title: Banana
SHADOWFALL-WARP.title: Warp
SHADOWFALL-TRIP.title: Trip
SHADOWFALL-GARBAGE_DAY.title: Garbage Day
SHADOWFALL-TRIAL_OF_KNOWLEDGE.title: Trial of Knowledge
SHADOWFALL-TRIAL_OF_KNOWLEDGE.descriptio: The next time you end your turn with 5 cards in your hand, gain {TrialOfKnowledgePower:diff()} [gold]Shards[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-TRIAL_OF_WEAPONRY.description: The next time you play 3 Attacks in one turn, Load {LoadAmmo:diff()} [gold]Ammo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-TRIAL_OF_WEAPONRY.title: Trial of Weaponry
SHADOWFALL-CONVERGENCE.description:
[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and {ShardsNextTurnPower:diff()} [gold]{ShardsNextTurnPower:plural:Shard|Shards}[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-CONVERGENCE.title: Convergence
SHADOWFALL-CONTRABAND.description: Put the top {Cards:diff()} cards of your draw pile into your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-CONTRABAND.title: Contraband
SHADOWFALL-SPACE_PIRATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put {IfUpgraded:show:an upgraded |}[gold]Flash of Steel[/gold], [gold]Fisticuffs[/gold], or [gold]The Bomb[/gold] into your [gold]Cargo[/gold] at random.
SHADOWFALL-SPACE_PIRATE.title: Space Pirate
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_IMAGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have 7 or more cards in hand, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] again.
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_IMAGE.title: Mirror Image
SHADOWFALL-TARGET_ACQUIRED.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Load {LoadAmmo:diff()} [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Your [gold]Shots[/gold] targets the enemy this turn.
SHADOWFALL-TARGET_ACQUIRED.title: Target Acquired
SHADOWFALL-SIEGE.title: Siege
SHADOWFALL-DEFENSIVE_CANNONADE.title: Defensive Cannonade
SHADOWFALL-GET_STRONGER.title: Get Stronger
SHADOWFALL-HOARD.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each card in your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-HOARD.title: Hoard
SHADOWFALL-ARMADA.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Load 1 [gold]Ammo[/gold].
|}At the start of your turn, Load 1 [gold]Ammo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-ARMADA.title: Armada
SHADOWFALL-TRADE_ROUTES.description: You draw an additional card from your [gold]Cargo[/gold] each turn.
SHADOWFALL-TRADE_ROUTES.title: Trade Routes
SHADOWFALL-CRYSTAL_CHASSIS.description:
Your Defends grant {ExtraBlock:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold].
Add an [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Ultimate Defend+|Ultimate Defend}[/gold] into your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-CRYSTAL_CHASSIS.title: Crystal Chassis
SHADOWFALL-THE_LOST_BLADE.description: Unplayable unless your hand is full. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
SHADOWFALL-THE_LOST_BLADE.title: The Lost Blade
SHADOWFALL-ASTRAL_STRIKE.title: Astral Strike
SHADOWFALL-E_M_PULSE.description: When drawn, enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SHADOWFALL-E_M_PULSE.title: EM Pulse
SHADOWFALL-THE_STARS_ALIGN.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
SHADOWFALL-THE_STARS_ALIGN.title: The Stars Align
SHADOWFALL-FIRE_EVERYTHING.description: Add {LoadAmmo:diff()} [gold]Ammo[/gold]. Your [gold]Shots[/gold] cost no energy this turn.
SHADOWFALL-FIRE_EVERYTHING.title: Fire Everything!
SHADOWFALL-POWERED_THRUSTERS.title: Powered Thrusters
SHADOWFALL-SUCCESSOR.description: Add Replay {Repeat:diff()} to a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and put it into your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-SUCCESSOR.title: Successor
SHADOWFALL-MISDIRECTION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put a card from your [gold]Cargo[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It counts as having been drawn.
SHADOWFALL-MISDIRECTION.title: Misdirection
SHADOWFALL-POWERED_BARRIER.title: Powered Barrier
SHADOWFALL-RED_GIANT.title: Red Giant
SHADOWFALL-SHIP_MAINTENANCE.description:
Add a [gold]Automation[/gold], [gold]Prowess[/gold] and [gold]Stratagem[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
They are [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-SHIP_MAINTENANCE.title: Ship Maintenance
SHADOWFALL-ESCORT_ME.description: Add X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} [gold]Minion Sacrifice[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-ESCORT_ME.title: Escort Me
SHADOWFALL-SPEED_HARVEST.description:
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
Whenever you fully Block an Attack, gain 1 [gold]Shard[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-SPEED_HARVEST.title: Speed Harvest
SHADOWFALL-TRIAL_OF_SPACE.description: The next time you play a total of 15 cards, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] ALL of your cards.
SHADOWFALL-TRIAL_OF_SPACE.title: Trial of Space
SHADOWFALL-BIG_GUNS.description:
Your [gold]Shots[/gold] now deals damage to ALL enemies.
Every 10{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} you spend, Load {BigGuns:diff()} [gold]Ammo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-BIG_GUNS.title: Big Guns
SHADOWFALL-TRIAL_OF_ONE.description:
The next time you spend 5{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} in a single turn,
gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-TRIAL_OF_ONE.title: Trial of One
SHADOWFALL-CONSTRUCT.description: At the start of your turn, gain {ShardsEachTurnPower:diff()} [gold]Shards[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-CONSTRUCT.title: Construct
SHADOWFALL-ASSEMBLY_REQUIRED.description:
Add a [gold]Fragment[/gold] to each player's [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:
Add an extra to your own.|}
SHADOWFALL-ASSEMBLY_REQUIRED.title: Assembly Required
SHADOWFALL-FRAGMENT.title: Fragment
SHADOWFALL-GRAPESHOT.description: When you fire a [gold]Shot[/gold], fire another that deals half damage.
SHADOWFALL-GRAPESHOT.title: Grapeshot
SHADOWFALL-EXALTED_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, add a 0-cost [gold]Discovery[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-EXALTED_FORM.title: Exalted Form
SHADOWFALL-CONSTELLATION.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Put a card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-CONSTELLATION.title: Constellation
SHADOWFALL-THE_SEALED_THRONE.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Double this card's damage for each [gold]Warp[/gold] you've played this combat.
SHADOWFALL-THE_SEALED_THRONE.title: Overdrive
SHADOWFALL-SMUGGLE.description: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards in your hand to put into your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
SHADOWFALL-SMUGGLE.title: Smuggle
SHADOWFALL-AMMO_VOLLEY.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.{GainsBlock:cond:
Gain {ShotBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].|}
SHADOWFALL-AMMO_VOLLEY.title: Shot
SHADOWFALL-SUPERMASSIVE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each card you created this combat.
SHADOWFALL-SUPERMASSIVE.title: Supermassive
